description: Add date preset buttons to the dashboard filter bar (Hoje, Ultimos 7 dias, Mes atual, Mes anterior, Ultimo trimestre, Semestre, Ano) with calendar-based calculation and multi-month cache combination logic.
steps: Add a date preset select dropdown to relatorios.html filter bar
Add preset date calculation logic in relatorios.js (Hoje, Ultimos 7 dias, Mes atual, Mes anterior, Ultimo trimestre, Semestre, Ano)
Add multi-month cache combination logic: when a period spans multiple months, check if all individual months exist in cache and combine their dados arrays
Style the preset selector to match existing filter bar design
acceptance_criteria: Date preset select is visible in the filter bar
Selecting a preset correctly sets Data Inicial and Data Final based on current calendar
Multi-month periods check cache for each individual month and combine results if all are cached
If any month is missing from cache, falls through to normal API flow
verification: Verify JS has no syntax errors
Verify preset calculations produce correct dates
